segments.original_text: あれでもねあの位置関係でね

segments.text: You can still secure the KO from there, right?
segments.original_text: ちゃんとウエストまで撃墜できるんですよね

segments.text: Even if you land Witch Time...
segments.original_text: ウィッチタイム取れても

segments.text: Getting a follow-up off it seems really tough though
segments.original_text: リターン出すの難しそうだなと思ったんですけど

segments.text: Oh, actually in the upper area...
segments.original_text: あっちょこれは上側が人とか

full_text: Even with that positioning though... You can still secure the KO from there, right? Even if you land Witch Time... Getting a follow-up off it seems really tough though Yeah, that's true Oh, actually in the upper area...
